title: Workshop 'Testing Methodology': Organisation, Development, and Results
author: Beltran Todolí, Joan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This deposit contains the materials produced during the external testing of the PeopleAndWriting methodological framework, carried out by postdoctoral researchers who were not involved in the design of the method. The files document how the analytical protocol was applied in practice across different research backgrounds and levels of palaeographical training, and they preserve the working traces of the exercise (templates, completed analytical records, and any accompanying notes) in a form that allows the testing process to be examined and reused. 
 These materials are provided to support methodological transparency and reuse. They enable users to assess the intelligibility of the analytical categories, the points at which interpretation required further calibration, and the kinds of results that can be generated when the method is applied beyond the project team. In doing so, they offer a concrete basis for replication, teaching, and further refinement of the framework in new corpora and research contexts.
